import io
import string

fn is_trailing_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn rstrip_ws(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut end_idx = n
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if end_idx == 0
      done = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(s, end_idx - 1)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if is_trailing_ws(b)
        end_idx = end_idx - 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  string.substring(s, 0, end_idx)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(input)
mut last_line = ""
mut found = false
mut current = ""
mut i = 0

while i < total
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    let stripped = rstrip_ws(current)
    if string.len(stripped) > 0
      last_line = current
      found = true
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(current) > 0
  let stripped = rstrip_ws(current)
  if string.len(stripped) > 0
    last_line = current
    found = true
  end
end

if found
  println(last_line)
else
  println("(none)")
end
